Part.Source:
&HojeData = serverdate()
For Each Order tmpNFeCod //CAPA NOTA TEMPORARIA Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod &FilCodFat = tmpNfeFatFilCod
&tmpNfeEnvEml = tmpNfeEnvEml //ENVIAR EMAIL DA NOTA
&NfeVlrTotPro = tmpTotPro &NfeVlrTotFrt = tmpTotFrt &NfeVlrTotIpi = tmpTotIpi &NfeVlrTot = tmpTotNFe
&NfeVlrTotSeg = tmpTotSeg &NfeVlrTotOutDsp = tmpTotOut &NfeVlrTotDsc = tmpTotDsc
&NfeVlrTotBasIcms = tmpTotBasIcm &NfeVlrTotIcms = tmpTotVlrIcm &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = tmpTotBasSt &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = tmpVlrSt
&NfeQtdVol = tmpNfeQtdVol &NfeEspVol = tmpNfeEspVol
&NfePesLiq = tmpNfePesLiq &NfePesBrt = tmpNfePesBrt
&tmpManNfeDadAdi = tmpManNfeDadAdi &tmpAutNfeDadAdi = tmpAutNfeDadAdi
&tmpNfeChvRef = tmpNfeChvRef &tmpNfeFin = tmpNfeFin
&tmpPedCliNom = tmpPedCliNom &tmpPedCliCnpj = tmpPedCliCnpj &tmpPedCliCpf = tmpPedCliCpf &tmpPedCliTip = tmpPedCliTip Exit EndFOr
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
//VERIFICA NOTA PENDENTE VerificaNotaDigitandoPedidoPDV.call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &FilCodFat, '65', &NfeGuid, &NfeCod, &NfeNum, &NfeSer)
if &NfeCod.IsEmpty() &NfeCod = UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Udp(domParCod.NOTAFISCAL, &EmpCod, &FilCodFat) Else ExcluirNfe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &NfeCod) Endif
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCodFat NfeCod = &NfeCod NfeFilCod = &FilCod NfePedCod = &PedCod NfeNum = &NfeNum NfeSer = &NfeSer NfeSts = Status_NFe.Digitando NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA
// NfeChvRef = &tmpNfeChvRef NfeFin = &tmpNfeFin
NfeDtaEms = &HojeData NfeDtaDsp = &HojeData NfeHorEms = SysTime() ModCod = '65' //NFe NfeTipFrt = PedTipFrt NfeLctCod = LctCod NfeEntSai = LctAtuSal NfeCliEml = &NfeCliEml If &tmpNfeEnvEml = true or not &NfeCliEml.IsEmpty() NfeEnvEml = NfeEnvEml.Pendente Else NfeEnvEml = NfeEnvEml.Nao_Enviar EndIF
//DESTINATARIO NfeCliCod = PedCliCod Do CAse Case &tmpPedCliTip = tipoPessoa.FISICA and not &tmpPedCliCpf.IsEmpty() NfeCliCpf = &tmpPedCliCpf NfeCliRaz = &tmpPedCliNom NfeCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.FISICA
Case &tmpPedCliTip = tipoPessoa.JURIDICA and not &tmpPedCliCnpj.IsEmpty() NfeCliCnpj = &tmpPedCliCnpj NfeCliRaz = &tmpPedCliNom NfeCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA Otherwise NfeCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.FISICA NfeCliRaz = 'CONSUMIDOR FINAL' EndCase
NfeCliIns = 'ISENTO' NfeCliSuf = ''//PedCliSuf NfeCliEnd = '' //PedCliEntLog NfeCliEndNro = '' //PedCliEntNro NfeCliBai = '' //PedCliEntBai NfeCliCidCod = FilCidCod NfeCliCidNom = FilCidNom //PedCliEntCidNom NfeCliCidIbge = FilCidUfeIbge //PedCliEntCidIbge
NfeCliCidUF = FilCidUfeCod NfeCliCep = FilCep NfeCliFon = '' //FormataFONE.Udp(PedCliPrmFon) NfeCliCpl = '' //PedCliEntCpl
//TRANPORTADORA //&PesFonNum = retornaPrimeiroTelefone.Udp(&EmpCod, PedTraRedCod)
NfeTraCod = 0 //PedTraRedCod NfeTraRaz = '' //PedTraRedRaz
NfeTraEnd = '' //PedTraRedLog NfeTraEndNro = '' //PedTraRedNro NfeTraBai = '' //PedTraRedBai NfeTraCidNom = '' //PedTraRedCidNom NfeTraCidUfeCod = '' //PedTraRedUfeCod NfeTraCnpj = '' //PedTraRedCnpj NfeTraCpf = '' //PedTraRedCPF NfeTraInsEst = '' //PedTraRedInsEst NfeTraTipPes = PedTraRedTipPes
NfeChv = '' //CHAVE DA NFE
NfeVlrTotPro = &NfeVlrTotPro NfeVlrTotFrt = &NfeVlrTotFrt NfeVlrTotIpi = &NfeVlrTotIpi NfeVlrTot = &NfeVlrTot
NfeVlrTotSeg = &NfeVlrTotSeg NfeVlrTotOutDsp = &NfeVlrTotOutDsp NfeVlrTotDsc = &NfeVlrTotDsc NfeVlrTotBasIcms = &NfeVlrTotBasIcms NfeVlrTotIcms = &NfeVlrTotIcms NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt = &NfeVlrTotBasIcmsSt NfeVlrTotIcmsSt = &NfeVlrTotIcmsSt
&TotLin = GxMlines(&tmpManNfeDadAdi, 100) &NumLin = 1 Do While &NumLin <= &TotLin NfeDadAdi = NfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' +GxGetMLi(&tmpManNfeDadAdi, &NumLin, 100) &NumLin += 1 EndDo
&TotLin = GxMlines(&tmpAutNfeDadAdi, 100) &NumLin = 1 Do While &NumLin <= &TotLin NfeDadAdi = NfeDadAdi.Trim() + ' ' +GxGetMLi(&tmpAutNfeDadAdi, &NumLin, 100) &NumLin += 1 EndDo
NfeDadManAdi = &tmpManNfeDadAdi NfeDadAutAdi = &tmpAutNfeDadAdi
NfeQtdVol = &NfeQtdVol NfeEspVol = &NfeEspVol
NfeVlrTotPdg = 0 NfeNroVol = '' NfeMarVol = '' NfeMotNom = '' NfeTraPlaCod = '' NfeTraPlaUF = ''
NfePesLiq = &NfePesLiq NfePesBrt = &NfePesBrt
NfeDeviceRandon = &NfeGuid
NfeEmiGnre = Status_SimNao.Nao EndNew EndFor
Commit
&tmpNfeChvRef = retornasoNumeros.Udp(&tmpNfeChvRef) if not &tmpNfeChvRef.IsEmpty() &sdtNotasReferenciadasItem = new() &sdtNotasReferenciadasItem.NfeDocRefNfe = &tmpNfeChvRef &sdtNotasReferenciadasItem.NfeDocRefMod = Substr(&tmpNfeChvRef, 21, 2) &sdtNotasReferenciadas.Add(&sdtNotasReferenciadasItem) prcGravaDocumentosReferenciados.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &NfeCod, &sdtNotasReferenciadas) Endif
&NfeItmCod = 0 For Each Order tmpNFeCod, tmpNfeItmCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod Where tmpPedQtdFat > 0
&NfeItmCod += 1
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCodFat NfeCod = &NfeCod NfeItmCod = &NfeItmCod NfeProCod = tmpProCod if tmpProGraCod <> 0 NfeProGraCod = tmpProGraCod Else NfeProGraCod = 1 EndIF NfeProNom = tmpProNom NfeProBar = tmpNfeProBar NfeProDadAdi = tmpNfeProDadAdi
NfeProCBenef = tmpCBenef
NfeNcmCod = tmpNcmCod NfeNcmCest = tmpNcmCEST &NfeCfoCod = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(tmpCFOP) NfeCfoCod = Substr(&NfeCfoCod,1,1) + '.' + Substr(&NfeCfoCod,2,3) NfeOriTriCod = tmpNfeOriCod NfeSitCod = tmpNfeSitCod NfeEmbUnd = tmpUnd NfeProQtd = tmpPedQtdFat NfeProVlrUnt = tmpPedVlrUntNov NfeProVlrDsc = tmpPedVlrDsc NfeProVlrTot = tmpPedVlrTotNov
NfeProBasIcms = tmpProBasVlrIcm NfeProTaxIcms = tmpProPerIcm NfeProVlrIcms = tmpProVlrIcm NfeProTaxRedIcms = tmpProPerRedIcm
//DIFERIMENTO NfeProTaxDif = tmpProPerDif NfeProVlrDif = tmpProVlrDif
NfeProBasIcmsSt = tmpProBasVlrIcmSt NfeProVlrImcsSt = tmpProVlrIcmSt NfeProTaxIcmsSt = tmpProPerIcmSt NfeProTaxRedIcmsSt = tmpProPerRedIcmSt
NfeProBasIpi = tmpPedVlrTotNov NfeProTaxIpi = tmpProPerIpi NfeProVlrIpi = tmpProVlrIpi
NfeProBasCofins = tmpProBasCofins NfeProCofinsRed = tmpProPerRedCofins NfeproVlrCofins = tmpProVlrCOFINS NfeProTaxCofins = tmpProPerCOFINS // % Cofins NfeCstCofins = tmpNfeCstCofins //CST Cofins
NfeProBasPIS = tmpProBasPIS NfeProPisRed = tmpProPerRedPis NfeProVlrPIS = tmpProVlrPIS NfeProTaxPIS = tmpProPerPIS //% PIS NfeCstPIS = tmpNfeCstPIS // CST PIS
NfeProVlrFrt = tmpProVlrFrt //Frete NfeProVlrApxTrib = tmpProVlrApxImp //APX TRIBUTOS
NfeProTaxMvaSt = tmpNfeProTaxMvaSt
NfeProVlrOutDsp = tmpProVlrOut
NfeProCodAnp = tmpNfeProCodAnp NfeProDscAnp = tmpNfeProDscAnp NfeProPerGlp = tmpNfeProPerGlp NfeProPerGni = tmpNfeProPerGni NfeProPerGnn = tmpNfeProPerGnn NfeProVlrPar = tmpNfeProVlrPar
//IBS CBS NfeIbsSit = tmpNfeIbsSit NfeIbsClassTrib = tmpNfeIbsClassTrib
//Retido NfeRegIbsSit = tmpNfeRegIbsSit NfeRegIbsClassTrib = tmpNfeRegIbsClassTrib
NfeRegIbsUfeTaxEfe = tmpNfeRegIbsUfeTaxEfe NfeRegIbsUfeVlr = tmpNfeRegIbsUfeVlr NfeRegIbsMunTaxEfe = tmpNfeRegIbsMunTaxEfe NfeRegIbsMunVlr = tmpNfeRegIbsMunVlr NfeRegCbsTaxEfe = tmpNfeRegCbsTaxEfe NfeRegCbsVlr = tmpNfeRegCbsVlr
NfeIbsBas = tmpNfeIbsBas
NfeIbsUfPer = tmpNfeIbsUfPer NfeIbsUfPerRed = tmpNfeIbsUfPerRed NfeIbsUfPerEfe = tmpNfeIbsUfPerEfe NfeIbsUfVlr = tmpNfeIbsUfVlr
NfeIbsMunPer = tmpNfeIbsMunPer NfeIbsMunPerRed = tmpNfeIbsMunPerRed NfeIbsMunVlr = tmpNfeIbsMunVlr NfeIbsMunEfe = tmpNfeIbsMunEfe
NfeCbsPer = tmpNfeCbsPer NfeCbsPerRed = tmpNfeCbsPerRed NfeCbsPerEfe = tmpNfeCbsPerEfe NfeCbsVlr = tmpNfeCbsVlr
//diferido NfeIbsUfPerDif = tmpNfeIbsUfPerDif NfeIbsUfVlrDif = tmpNfeIbsUfVlrDif NfeIbsMunPerDif = tmpNfeIbsMunPerDif NfeIbsMunVlrDif = tmpNfeIbsMunVlrDif NfeCbsPerDif = tmpNfeCbsPerDif NfeCbsVlrDif = tmpNfeCbsVlrDif EndNew EndFor
commit
ObsAutomaticaNFe.call(&EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &NfeCod) GravaTotaisNF.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &NfeCod, &NfeVlrTotDsc, 0, &NfeVlrTotOutDsp, &NfeVlrTotSeg, &NfeVlrTotFrt)
GravaDuplicatasNFe65_PDV.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCodFat, &NfeCod, &FilCod, &PedCod)
parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&PedCod, in:&tmpNFeCod, in:&NfeGuid, out:&NfeCod);
